list.name: JIRA incidents

panels.title: Tier 비중 (전체)
panels.description: embedding → rule → vision → rule-fallthrough → no_baseline. 1차에서 떨어질수록 위험.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "stb-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "catalog_runs" and r._field == "confidence")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.category, set: ${category:json}))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.priority, set: ${priority:json}))
  |> group(columns: ["tier"])
  |> count()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: r._value, _field: r.tier}))

panels.title: Tier 추이 (시간대별 stacked)
panels.description: 시점별 tier 분포 변화 — 펌웨어 업데이트 후 회색 지대 증가/감소 감지.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "stb-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "catalog_runs" and r._field == "confidence")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.category, set: ${category:json}))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.priority, set: ${priority:json}))
  |> group(columns: ["tier"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "tier_count")

panels.title: Gray Zone Ratio
panels.description: (rule + vision + rule-fallthrough + no_baseline) / total. 10% 넘으면 임계 재튜닝 신호 (docs/29 §7).

targets.query:
gray = from(bucket: "stb-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "catalog_runs" and r._field == "confidence")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.category, set: ${category:json}))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.priority, set: ${priority:json}))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.tier == "rule" or r.tier == "vision" or r.tier == "rule-fallthrough" or r.tier == "no_baseline")
  |> group()
  |> count()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

total = from(bucket: "stb-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "catalog_runs" and r._field == "confidence")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.category, set: ${category:json}))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.priority, set: ${priority:json}))
  |> group()
  |> count()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

import "array"
array.from(rows: [{_value: if total._value == 0 then 0.0 else float(v: gray._value) / float(v: total._value)}])

panels.title: Gray Zone Ratio 추이
panels.description: 회색 지대 비율의 시간 추이. 펌웨어 릴리스 시점과 함께 보세요.

targets.query:
base = from(bucket: "stb-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "catalog_runs" and r._field == "confidence")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.category, set: ${category:json}))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.priority, set: ${priority:json}))
  |> group()

gray = base
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.tier == "rule" or r.tier == "vision" or r.tier == "rule-fallthrough" or r.tier == "no_baseline")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count, createEmpty: true)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: if exists r._value then r._value else 0}))

total = base
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count, createEmpty: true)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: if exists r._value then r._value else 0}))

join(tables: {g: gray, t: total}, on: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: if r._value_t == 0 then 0.0 else float(v: r._value_g) / float(v: r._value_t), _field: "gray_zone_ratio"}))
  |> yield(name: "gray_zone_ratio")

panels.title: 회색 지대 tier별 빈도
panels.description: rule / vision / rule-fallthrough / no_baseline 각 카운트. vision이 많으면 비용 모니터링 필요.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "stb-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "catalog_runs" and r._field == "confidence")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.category, set: ${category:json}))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.priority, set: ${priority:json}))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.tier == "rule" or r.tier == "vision" or r.tier == "rule-fallthrough" or r.tier == "no_baseline")
  |> group(columns: ["tier"])
  |> count()

panels.title: 평균 Confidence (카테고리별)
panels.description: 낮은 카테고리는 expected_keywords 보강 / 베이스라인 재시드 후보.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "stb-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "catalog_runs" and r._field == "confidence")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.category, set: ${category:json}))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.priority, set: ${priority:json}))
  |> group(columns: ["category"])
  |> mean()

panels.title: Confidence 추이 (카테고리별)
panels.description: 0.85 위 green / 0.70~0.85 yellow / 미만 red. 점진적 하락은 베이스라인 stale 신호.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "stb-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "catalog_runs" and r._field == "confidence")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.category, set: ${category:json}))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.priority, set: ${priority:json}))
  |> group(columns: ["category"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "confidence")

panels.title: 카테고리 × Tier 매트릭스 (mean confidence)
panels.description: 어느 카테고리에서 어느 tier로 빠지는지 + 그때의 confidence. embedding 외 tier에 빈번하면 베이스라인 보강 후보.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "stb-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "catalog_runs" and r._field == "confidence")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.category, set: ${category:json}))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.priority, set: ${priority:json}))
  |> group(columns: ["category", "tier"])
  |> mean()
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["category"], columnKey: ["tier"], valueColumn: "_value")
